seoTitle: Surf Beach vs Sutherland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Surf Beach and Sutherland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Surf Beach vs Sutherland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Surf Beach and Sutherland.
heading: Surf Beach vs Sutherland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Surf Beach, Victoria and Sutherland, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Surf Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Sutherland (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Surf Beach or Sutherland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Surf Beach has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Sutherland scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Surf Beach scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Sutherland scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Surf Beach or Sutherland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Surf Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
